case_title: CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC. VS. ZUPPA LLC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $473.21 FILED BY CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZUPPA LLC. MANZARE, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-05-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
